untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measuring the size of the move preceding the flag formation and projecting that distance from breakout point. This requires pattern recognition (flag identification), historical move magnitude calculation, and dynamic price objective setting — capabilities not available in the allowed indicator set. No indicators can quantify 'preceding move size' or establish dynamic targets based on pattern geometry.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_3 describes a classical technical pattern (flag breakout with measured move objective). While breakout detection can approximate using Donchian channels (dc_upper), the core rule—'price objective equal to preceding move size'—cannot be translated into static indicator conditions. The signal requires: (1) flag pattern detection, (2) measurement of the prior impulse wave, (3) projection of that magnitude beyond breakout. These are pattern-based mechanics, not indicator-based mechanics. Recommended implementation: use pattern recognition library or manual rule with custom move size calculation.
